questionHtml: Suggest factors that could account for the growth curve of the M. gallopavo population.
markschemeHtml:
a. natality AND mortality

b. immigration AND emigration

c. resources/abiotic conditions/carrying capacity

d. predation/hunting

[Max 2 Marks]
